taxonomy: Proclesia acuminata is classified as a species of moth in the family Erebidae. It belongs to the genus Proclesia, which comprises various species of moths found in Southeast Asia. The family Erebidae is a large and diverse group of moths, often referred to as the "twin-spotted moths." The genus Proclesia is typically associated with the subfamily Arctiinae, which includes many species of moths with distinctive patterns and markings. The classification of Proclesia acuminata reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the Erebidae family.
